integrations.summary: Stripe payment intents + webhook + SSE payment events (ships enabled)
userSteps: Set the Stripe secret key and webhook signing secret (https://dashboard.stripe.com); point the webhook at POST /v1/payments/stripe-webhook (docs/features/PAYMENTS_STRIPE.md).
Mobile counterpart: `ctx0 enable payments_stripe` in the app repo.

integrations.summary: FCM dispatch worker + firebase token registration endpoints (ships enabled)
userSteps: Create a Firebase service account and initialize FirebaseApp with its credentials (docs/features/NOTIFICATIONS.md); the dispatch worker no-ops until configured.
Mobile counterpart: `ctx0 enable push_firebase` in the app repo.

integrations.summary: Google Sign-In endpoint + identity link (ships enabled; token validation lives in Ctx0.Security)
userSteps: Register the OAuth client ids under Authentication:Google:ClientIds (docs/security/AUTHENTICATION.md).

integrations.summary: Nearby geo-items endpoint (PostGIS) + its output cache (ships enabled)
userSteps: Mobile counterpart: `ctx0 enable maps_google` in the app repo (needs MAPS_API_KEY).

integrations.summary: Forced App Updates interceptor + overlay screen (ships enabled)
userSteps: Set ClientSettings:MinimumClientVersion to force older clients to update.
Mobile counterpart: `ctx0 enable app_updates` in the app repo.
